title: The AAIB has sent a team of inspectors to Southend, Essex
body: "The AAIB has started an investigation into an accident involving an aircraft near Southend Airport which occurred 13 July. A multi-disciplinary team including inspectors with expertise in aircraft operations, human factors, engineering and recorded data are at the accident site gathering evidence.     Media enquiries:      During office hours 01932 440015   Out of office hours 0300 777 7878    "
